channel.title: Comments on: Episode 36 – Allagash White
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: By: David Little
item.dc:creator: David Little
item.description: Can't get Allagash in CA, Deano? Perhaps we can work an "airlift!" I certainly know the feeling. I have to go to CA myself to get Russian River, Lost Abbey, Green Flash, etc.
item.content:encoded: Can’t get Allagash in CA, Deano? Perhaps we can work an “airlift!” I certainly know the feeling. I have to go to CA myself to get Russian River, Lost Abbey, Green Flash, etc.

item.title: By: Screwtop
item.dc:creator: Screwtop
item.description:
I'll give it a try as soon as I finish the 60-minute IPA in the basement. I hope they have it at at my local dispensory. Good clip.
ST
item.content:encoded:
I’ll give it a try as soon as I finish the 60-minute IPA in the basement. I hope they have it at at my local dispensory. Good clip.

ST

item.title: By: Deano
item.dc:creator: Deano
item.description: Great episode guys I don't think I can get my hands on this out here in California though :( It sounds good.
item.content:encoded: Great episode guys I don’t think I can get my hands on this out here in California though 🙁 It sounds good.

item.title: By: Bobby
item.dc:creator: Bobby
item.description:
You guys present what craft beer is all about - interesting, adventuresome, somewhat challenging and fun! Thank goodness there's no cure.
Keep up the great work.
item.content:encoded:
You guys present what craft beer is all about – interesting, adventuresome, somewhat challenging and fun! Thank goodness there’s no cure.

Keep up the great work.

item.title: By: John's mom
item.dc:creator: John's mom
item.description: put some powder on David's head...it reflects the ceiling lights... AND John, is this the beer that tastes like turtle water to me???
item.content:encoded: put some powder on David’s head…it reflects the ceiling lights… AND John, is this the beer that tastes like turtle water to me???
